Velmora was founded in a small Manhattan studio with a single belief:
                that the most beautiful jewelry doesn’t announce itself. It
                listens. It lingers. It earns its place in a life. Every piece is hand-finished in 18K gold plate over hypoallergenic
                metals, designed to be worn daily and passed down softly. No trends,
                no shouting — just quietly considered jewelry, made to be treasured. A quieter kind of luxury.
